name: Shihoru
description:
__Race:__ Human
__Height:__ Unknown
__Class:__ Mage

The Mage of the group. She is shy, only opening up to Yume and Manato which led to a one-sided crush on him. Yume is constantly trying to get her to interact more with the group.

~! Shihoru becomes completely heart broken because of Manato's death !~
